metaDescription: Get in touch with Trading With Matt for plan guidance, membership questions, and premium trading access.
title: Start the conversation before you join.
intro: Reach out for membership questions, plan fit, collaboration, or direct contact about how the Trading With Matt ecosystem works. The tone here should feel personal, premium, and decisive.

infoCards.label: Best use
infoCards.body: VIP plan questions, access requests, partnerships, or private guidance.

ctaTitle: Request access or ask which plan is right for you.
ctaBody: Use the form to reach out now. If you are still comparing paths inside the brand, the VIP plans page gives the clearest next step.
formBody: Use this form for plan guidance, Indicator PRO questions, private access requests, or collaboration opportunities.

formFields.label: Message
formFields.name: message
formFields.placeholder: Tell us what you are looking for.

formHelperText: This is the polished form shell. We can wire delivery to Netlify Forms, Formspree, Resend, or a custom endpoint in the next step.
